b3_invariants.description: context_components must equal linker plus warhead
target_atoms_count must be greater than zero
context_atoms_count must be greater than zero
linker_atoms_count must be greater than zero
warhead_atoms_count must be greater than zero
scaffold_atoms_count must be greater than zero
target and context atom sets must be disjoint
target plus context covers all scaffold/linker/warhead ligand atoms
warhead atoms must remain visible in context
linker atoms must remain visible in context
scaffold atoms must not leak into context
covalent atom-pair labels stay available as conditioning/evaluation metadata, not target leakage
B3 must not alter A/B/B2/C semantics
B3 must fail safely if scaffold/linker/warhead labels are missing or empty

b3_semantics.context_description: linker and warhead atoms stay visible; covalent-reactive end geometry remains conditioning context

relation_to_B2.B2_scaffold_warhead: predict scaffold and warhead from linker context
relation_to_B2.B3_scaffold_only: predict scaffold from linker and warhead context

scaffold_hopping_value: BBB and permeability exploration while preserving linker-warhead geometry
metabolic stability exploration while preserving covalent reaction geometry
selectivity and patent-space exploration around fixed linker-warhead context
b3_semantics.target_description: scaffold atoms are hidden and predicted

source_inspection_notes: batch_adapter and tensor materialization outputs use four long-form mask level names.
legacy masking.py and docs/covalent_data_schema.md still expose short A/B/B2/C naming.
legacy masking.py includes mask_scaffold for B2; additive implementation should protect current downstream B2_scaffold_warhead semantics.

five_level_mask_table.use_case: grow linker and warhead from known scaffold
co-design scaffold and warhead around linker geometry
scaffold hopping with fixed linker-warhead geometry
de novo full covalent ligand generation

five_level_table.use_case: grow linker and warhead from known scaffold
co-design scaffold and warhead around linker geometry
scaffold hopping with fixed linker-warhead geometry
de novo full covalent ligand generation

invariants.description: context_components must equal linker plus warhead
target_atoms_count must be greater than zero
context_atoms_count must be greater than zero
linker_atoms_count must be greater than zero
warhead_atoms_count must be greater than zero
scaffold_atoms_count must be greater than zero
target and context atom sets must be disjoint
target plus context covers all scaffold/linker/warhead ligand atoms
warhead atoms must remain visible in context
linker atoms must remain visible in context
scaffold atoms must not leak into context
covalent atom-pair labels stay available as conditioning/evaluation metadata, not target leakage
B3 must not alter A/B/B2/C semantics
B3 must fail safely if scaffold/linker/warhead labels are missing or empty

pass_conditions: B3 mask can be built on synthetic covalent sample
B3 target atom count greater than zero
B3 context atom count greater than zero
A/B/B2/C outputs unchanged relative to previous expected semantics

risk_register.description: B3 depends on reliable scaffold/linker/warhead atom labels.
risk_register.mitigation: Fail safely when any region is missing or empty; add fixture coverage.

risk_register.description: B3 can be confused with current B2 if names are unclear.
risk_register.mitigation: Keep B2 name and semantics unchanged; add explicit B2-vs-B3 table tests.

risk_register.description: B3 preserves warhead/linker and may overfit fixed reactive geometry.
risk_register.mitigation: Track geometry metrics separately and avoid quality claims.

risk_register.description: Scaffold-only target may be too large or too diverse.
risk_register.mitigation: Start with smoke counts and later stratify scaffold sizes.

risk_register.description: Generated scaffold can be disconnected if linker attachment constraints are weak.
risk_register.mitigation: Require attachment metadata and connectivity checks before real training.

risk_register.description: B3 does not prove generated scaffold is chemically valid.
risk_register.mitigation: Keep implementation smoke separate from chemistry validity gates.

risk_register.description: B3 does not prove BBB, metabolic, or selectivity improvement.
risk_register.mitigation: Forbid property claims until downstream evaluation exists.

risk_register.description: Adding B3 changes task sampling distribution later.
risk_register.mitigation: Require schedule design before any real training loop includes B3.

risk_register.description: Current synthetic 10D path does not prove real feature semantics.
risk_register.mitigation: Require real covalent feature mapping and loader gate before real data use.

risk_register.description: Real covalent loader gate is still required before real training.
risk_register.mitigation: Keep B3 implementation and real loader readiness as separate gates.

smoke_roadmap.execution_boundary: no model forward or gradient pass
smoke_roadmap.purpose: add B3 to mask logic and tests
run mask sweep including A/B/B2/B3/C and verify target/context counts
strict-loaded model with B3 synthetic finite loss
B3 loss requires gradient and gradient values are finite
one controlled parameter update on B3
gate real feature mapping and loader readiness before real data use
